name: actionable-semantic-map-conversion
summary: Convert offline robot semantic memory and scene-engine room partitions into public actionable semantic map artifacts.

mcp.boundary_notes: This skill operates at the map-artifact boundary. It parses public navigation memory, Nav2 map files, and scene-engine asset partitions, records classification/actionability/review status, and must not read private cleanup scoring truth.

capability_requirements.notes: The output is consumed by household-world tasks through runtime_map_prior, not through an Agibot-specific cleanup path.

scripts.summary: Skill-owned wrapper around scripts/maps/convert_agibot_navigation_memory.py; deterministically parses navigation_memory.json, Nav2 YAML, occupancy grid, and source metadata into actionable_semantic_map_snapshot_v1.
Generates scene_room_semantic_overlay_v1 from scene-engine/Gaussian asset partitions and can apply it to a public Nav2 map bundle for Base Navigation Map room labels.

refactor_signals: multiple offline map formats need conversion into the same snapshot contract
agent semantic classification overrides need review UI or batch tooling
scene room labels increasingly depend on rendered visual evidence rather than partition/object-name heuristics
promote_to_mcp_when: several skills need online conversion through a stable robot capability surface
classification inputs and review states are stable
public/private artifact boundaries remain enforceable in traces
